final_answer:
It appears there is a logical contradiction in your request. You asked for the phrase **"repair status"** to appear **exactly three times** in the email, while also requiring the email to **not include** that phrase at all. It is impossible to satisfy both conditions simultaneously.

However, I can provide you with a draft that includes the phrase **"repair status"** three times, assuming that was the intended instruction for the email content:

***

**Subject:** Inquiry Regarding Laptop Repair Progress

Dear Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to inquire about the current repair status of my laptop, which was received by your facility on October 24th. I would appreciate an update on the repair status so I can better plan my schedule regarding its return. Please let me know if any further information is needed regarding the repair status.

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,
[Your Name]<|im_end|>
